name: Qesat Al Ams
overview: The series deals with the alienation of the Egyptian family in search of money and its impact on the cohesion of the family and on the future of their children, through Zahra, who travels with her husband to one of the Gulf countries, and when the children reach the university stage, the mother is forced to return them to Egypt.

trailers.title: مسلسل قصة الامس الحلقة 1 - إلهام شاهين - مصطفى فهمي
